writer.name: 苏赞娜·利普斯科姆 Suzannah Lipscomb

this_title: Anne Boleyn Queen for a Thousand Days
introduction: Historian Suzannah Lipscomb examines the extraordinary story of the tumultuous love affair between Henry VIII and Anne Boleyn, exploring what brought them together and tore them apart. She visits the places where Henry and Anne lived, loved and fought, and uses dramatic reconstructions and first-hand accounts to delve into their passionate and volatile relationship.
foreign_title: Anne Boleyn Queen for a Thousand Days
